# headerTextProvider

**Instance Property**

The header text to display in the complication.

## Declaration

```swift
@_NilHidden<CLKTextProvider> @objc final var headerTextProvider: CLKTextProvider { get set }
```

## Discussion

This property supports multicolor text.

## Accessing the Content

- **headerLabel**: The SwiftUI view displayed by the template.
- **bodyTextProvider**: The main body text to display in the complication.
- **gaugeProvider**: The gauge to display in the complication.
